raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Remove contaminated clothing and shoes immediately.
STEP 2: Wash skin thoroughly with soap and large amounts of water for 15-20 minutes.
STEP 3: Flush eyes with water if any splash occurred.
DO NOT: Use neutralizing agents or ointments on the skin.
ESCALATE: Seek immediate medical attention and provide the product label/SDS.

immediate_steps: Remove contaminated clothing and shoes immediately.
Wash skin thoroughly with soap and large amounts of water for 15-20 minutes.
Flush eyes with water if any splash occurred.
do_not_do: Use neutralizing agents or ointments on the skin.
escalate_when: Seek immediate medical attention and provide the product label/SDS.
